codeReview.summary: The feature still satisfies the intended governance assertions in the current repo state. The committed Factory init script, services manifest, worker skills, and library guidance exist in the expected locations, are repo-specific to this Next.js marketing site, and stay aligned with the canonical pnpm validation stack and the Playwright/browser smoke target on 127.0.0.1:3001.
